intro: Technology, cybersecurity, government, healthcare, and artificial intelligence sectors were the primary targets in 48 articles tagged ai-security from April 12 to 27, 2026, with a severity mix of 21 high, 6 medium, 6 critical, and 12 informational reports. The threat actor OpenClaw was observed, alongside critical vulnerabilities CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) and CVE-2026-5752 (CVSS 9.3). Impacts were recorded globally, with specific focus on China and the United States.
